description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and installs sassc and make via apk add --update sassc make in a global before_script. Define a pages job (named "pages") that runs in the default stage, executes the shell commands "cd site", "make build", and "mv public ../public", then publishes the resulting public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and configure it to run only on the master branch.
